skip_reason: Individual Snapchat Spotlight post URLs are not permanently stable - the storyId in the URL can change or the specific post can be removed/replaced over time, which would break this test unpredictably even though the bookmarklet itself still works. Skipping until a guaranteed-stable public Spotlight post URL is identified.
notes: Passive - V9 modal (id: __scSpotlightModal) titled 'Snapchat Spotlight Data'. Reads __NEXT_DATA__ → props.pageProps.spotlightStoryMetadata[0].videoMetadata for uploadDateMs (ms epoch), contentUrl, creator username/name, viewCount, durationMs. Falls back to spotlightHighlights[0].snapList[0].timestampInSec.value if spotlightStoryMetadata is absent. Upload Date shown with dual ISO+local format and 🚨 if within 7 days. Export row has Copy Data/JSON/CSV buttons plus Extracted timestamp. Alerts 'No date data found on this page.' if no timestamp is found. NOTE: Snapchat moved from JSON-LD datePublished to __NEXT_DATA__ uploadDateMs (ms) as of mid-2025.

checks.text_contains: Generated by a bookmarklet from https://tools.myosint.training
